No Poverty.reason: The course content, focusing on human resource management, does not directly address poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: There is no explicit or implicit mention of food security, nutrition, sustainable agriculture, or related hunger targets in the syllabus.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course does not cover health services, disease prevention, mental health, or other targets related to good health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a tertiary-level MBA program focused on developing advanced professional knowledge and HR management skills for employment, directly aligning with Targets 4.3 and 4.4.
